rationale: No qualitative change affecting Poland this cycle; Iran deal remains stalled with Tehran contradicting Trump, keeping mild energy uncertainty, but no new escalation in Ukraine or EU economy.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Iran deal stalemate continues with no breakthrough; mild energy price uncertainty persists for Poland but no structural change from prior cycle.

top_events.title: France-Germany jet plans: Can Europe end reliance on US for security?
top_events.summary: European defence autonomy debate is relevant to Poland as a NATO frontline state, but this is a long-term industrial story with no immediate policy impact.

top_events.title: Anti-immigrant unrest in Belfast
top_events.summary: Riots in Belfast are geographically distant and have no direct bearing on Polish daily life or security; minor background noise.
